{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Serpent's Shadow
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Serpent’s [[Shadow]] is a technique used by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
